projects.title: High-Potential Ad Keyword Selection Tool
projects.summary: Built with Claude skill + Looker Studio to help ad sales, planners, and marketing teams query site traffic data, auto-shortlist high-potential keywords, and generate GAM targeting lists with placement recommendations — significantly reducing manual prep time.

projects.title: Building a Digital-First Editorial Operating Model
projects.summary: Led the redesign of the digital editorial production workflow by coordinating editorial, design, engineering, social media, and newsroom teams — shifting the organization toward a digital-first content operating model centered on user experience.
outcomes: Established cross-functional production workflow and fixed delivery cadence
Consistent quarterly delivery: 1 large + 1 small digital editorial campaign

images.caption: Production Cycle & Quarterly Schedule

projects.title: Website Redesign Projects
projects.summary: Led planning and project management for two website redesigns, covering brand visual refresh, UX optimization, new feature development, and content strategy.

descriptions.label: National Human Rights Museum — Official Website Redesign
descriptions.text: Participated in the full redesign of the museum's website and brand visual identity (2021/05–2022/01). Led project scoping and management, defining the brand rejuvenation direction, UX improvements, and design-development specifications.

descriptions.label: 2025 Talent, in Taiwan — Sustainability Action Alliance
descriptions.text: Covered content agenda-setting, advocacy review, and new feature development (2024/11–2025/03). Drove SEO improvements, dedicated page planning and design-development, and overall content experience optimization.
